title: Associate Scientist – Cell Culture (1 yr contract/PHARMA MNC) - Entry Level/West #HAO
description:
Salary: up to $4000
Duration: 1 year
Working Days & Hours: Mon-fri office hrs
Location: Tuas (islandwide pickup)


Job Description:
Perform routine and non-routine microbiological testing as part of R&D studies.

Preparation of media, perform sample plating, incubation and colony enumeration.

Handle and maintain laboratory equipment, ensuring it is calibrated and functioning accurately.

Document results in Electronic Lab Notebook (ELN) and upload data into the LIMS system (NEXUS).

Maintain lab cleanliness and manage lab supplies to ensure a well-organized and efficient work environment.

Ensure adherence to all site-specific safety and hygiene protocols.

Communicate any issues or abnormalities to R&D personnel and team leaders immediately·       Manufacturing process trending, participating in process validation activities, providing technical support, drafting technical justifications and process understanding by process mapping

·       Additional activities include the design, execution, and interpretation of experiments to perform process characterization, evaluate novel technologies, identify process improvements, drafting risk assessments and providing technical expertise to support regulatory submissions

·       A basic understanding of cell culture or fermentation biology, process scale-up and statistical methods is essential.

·       Hands-on experience working in the lab, aseptic technique, cell culture and bioreactor operations, to support the routine responsibilities with solid scientific data is also desirable.

·       The position necessitates extensive interaction with manufacturing, quality, purification process development as well as CMC/Regulatory Affairs groups


Job Requirements: Min Degree in Life Sciences or similar w min relevant internship experience in cell culture and sound chemical, mathematical and biological training

Interested candidates, please submit your resume to: allylok@recruitexpress.com.sg


Ally Audrey Lok Xin Woon

Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Lifescience)

Company EA Licence number : 99C4599

Personnel EA License: R21102307

allylok@recruitexpress.com.sg
